entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

params.sampling: The sampling options to use when drawing the surface.
params.p: The point at which to draw the top-left corner of the surface.
params.surface: The surface whose contents to draw.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw without additional effects.

fields.summary: Draws the contents of a surface onto this canvas at the specified point using the given sampling options.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

params.sampling: The sampling options to use when drawing the surface.
params.x: The x-coordinate at which to draw the left edge of the surface.
params.y: The y-coordinate at which to draw the top edge of the surface.
params.surface: The surface whose contents to draw.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw without additional effects.

fields.summary: Draws the contents of a surface onto this canvas at the specified coordinates using the given sampling options.
